Already impeached and convicted
before the people of this city for
furnishing a poor quality Of gas,
and Of SO furnishing it that it is
an undesirable necessity in many
instances. the local gas monopoly
is further indicted for working a
petty graft on the people of Spo-
kane.


The gas company claims to have
about 1000 clients in Spokane, and
it demands a deposit of IS from
each. This means approximately
$4,000.


The Press has been trying to dis
cover II this gas company pays
taxes or compensates the public in
any way for the use of this money.


A similar state of affairs exists
with the electrometers of the
Washington Water Power COM
pany.


Undoubtedly these two giant
monopolies are enjoying the bene-
fits of 100000 which is working in
the interests of monopoly, taken
